name: In Idaho, is hearing loss from factory noise covered by workers comp?

mainEntity.name: In Idaho, is hearing loss from factory noise covered by workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if proven as occupational disease from work exposure without protection.[4] Context: Idaho Industrial Commission handles claims; must show job causation over age.[4] Key factors: Audiology reports, exposure history, no TTD if no lost time.[4] Practical guidance: File with tests and records; lawyer argues against age defenses.[4][7] Benefits include medical and PPI.
